description: Detailer agent step schemas. Closure emits verdict in {handoff-impl, blocked} for outputPhases routing (workflow.json).

closure.detail.description: Detail closure response — convert a considerer comment into an Implementation Spec comment and emit a verdict that routes phase transition.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of what was specified.

action.description: Closure intent. Always 'closing' for single-iteration detailer.

verdict.description: Verdict propagated to orchestrator. 'handoff-impl' = all five spec sections filled (Summary / Changes / Approach / Acceptance Criteria / Test Plan). 'blocked' = specification not possible (missing considerer input, untargetable files, unmet preconditions, etc.).

closure_action.description: Detailer never closes issues itself. Label operations are deferred to the orchestrator via workflow.json labelMapping.

issue.description: GitHub Issue label mutations. Detailer leaves this empty — orchestrator handles phase-driven labelling.

detail_summary.description: One-paragraph recap of the Implementation Spec. Handed off to downstream (iterator) phase on 'handoff-impl'. Required for both verdicts (empty-but-present is not acceptable).

spec_comment_url.description: URL of the posted Implementation Spec comment on the GitHub issue. Null when verdict='blocked' and no comment was posted.

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable reason when verdict='blocked'. Null when verdict='handoff-impl'.
